name: LPL Financial Holdings Inc.
description: LPL Financial Holdings Inc. is a leading American financial services company and the largest independent broker-dealer in the United States. Founded in 1989, the firm provides an integrated platform of brokerage, investment advisory, and wealth management services to independent financial advisors and financial institutions. Headquartered in the U.S., LPL Financial offers a comprehensive suite of technology, research, and business resources designed to support advisors in delivering personalized financial guidance to their clients, helping them grow their practices while maintaining independence in the competitive financial services landscape.
